'''radaga''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:zechin|zechin]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| r-d-g
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:zechin|zechin]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| radaga
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:rædægæth|rædægæth]] || [[word:rædægæj|rædægæj]] || [[word:rædægæsh|rædægæsh]] || [[word:rædægæ|rædægæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:radadagath|radadagath]] || [[word:radadagaj|radadagaj]] || [[word:radadagash|radadagash]] || [[word:radadaga|radadaga]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:radagath|radagath]] || [[word:radagaj|radagaj]] || [[word:radagash|radagash]] || [[word:radaga|radaga]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:radafgath|radafgath]] || [[word:radafgaj|radafgaj]] || [[word:radafgash|radafgash]] || [[word:radafgaf|radafgaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:radagatha|radagatha]] || [[word:radagaja|radagaja]] || [[word:radagasha|radagasha]] || [[word:radagaka|radagaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:radagath|radagath]] || [[word:radagaj|radagaj]] || [[word:radagash|radagash]] || [[word:radaga|radaga]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:radagathal|radagathal]] || [[word:radagajal|radagajal]] || [[word:radagashal|radagashal]] || [[word:radagakal|radagakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:radagathatha|radagathatha]] || [[word:radagajaja|radagajaja]] || [[word:radagashasha|radagashasha]] || [[word:radagaka|radagaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:radagathan|radagathan]] || [[word:radagajan|radagajan]] || [[word:radagashan|radagashan]] || [[word:radagakan|radagakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:radagathaoro|radagathaoro]] || [[word:radagajaoro|radagajaoro]] || [[word:radagashaoro|radagashaoro]] || [[word:radagakaoro|radagakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|d2c7592}}
